steps.t: Cangrail and Brúnion can be found to the north-west and north-east of Crithost, in Talath Anor. Barathant asked you to find and recall the scout he se…
Barathant is in the town of Crithost, waiting to hear that his scouts have agreed to return to the North-gate of the Rammas Echor.
Ingold, the Captain of the Out-wall, is at the North-gate of the Rammas Echor. The scouts in Talath Anor are retreating to the North-gate, and you sho…
Ingold, the Captain of the Out-wall, is at the North-gate of the Rammas Echor.
Prince Imrahil is in the First Circle of Minas Tirith, waiting for you to return with news of the situation in Talath Anor.
